query.description: Temporal visibility query. The SQL-like WHERE clause accepted by Temporal's ListWorkflow endpoint, e.g. "ExecutionStatus = 'Running'".

limit.description: Maximum number of workflow executions the visibility query returns (single page). Mirrors the server-side PageSize parameter.

concurrency.description: Number of concurrent cancel requests dispatched to the Temporal frontend. Capped at 100 to protect the frontend from overload.
